name: ax-monitor-server
description: AX measurement retail server for Claude Code. Receives the raw session transcript POSTed by the ax-monitor hook (POST /v1/sessions), captures it, prints a deterministic breakdown, optionally summarizes (OpenAI-compatible) and forwards upstream, and serves a read-only dashboard. Single-file stdlib http.server (zero pip deps). Bundles the 'install-ax-server' and 'uninstall-ax-server' skills which install it as a nohup-managed daemon with a configurable bind IP and port (default 14200).
